parameters.query:
-- Fetch S6 records in batches of 10
SELECT
    record_id,
    full_name,
    email,
    phone,
    company,
    job_title,
    normalized_url,
    stage,
    status,
    created_at
FROM _learnersRaw
WHERE stage = 'S6'
AND status = 'crm_pending'
ORDER BY created_at ASC
LIMIT 10;

INSERT INTO crm_records_final
(record_id, crm_id, full_name, email,
 phone, company, job_title,
 normalized_url, crm_status,
 api_response, synced_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.record_id }}',
  'CRM-{{ $json.id }}',
  '{{ $json.crm_payload?.fullName || $json.full_name }}',
  '{{ $json.crm_payload?.emailAddress || $json.email }}',
  '{{ $json.crm_payload?.phoneNumber || $json.phone }}',
  '{{ $json.crm_payload?.organization || $json.company }}',
  '{{ $json.crm_payload?.jobTitle || $json.job_title }}',
  '{{ $json.normalized_url }}',
  'synced',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json).substring(0, 500) }}',
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (record_id)
DO UPDATE SET
  crm_id = EXCLUDED.crm_id,
  crm_status = 'synced',
  api_response = EXCLUDED.api_response,
  synced_at = NOW(),
  updated_at = NOW();

-- Only update to S7 AFTER successful CRM response
UPDATE _learnersRaw
SET stage = 'S7',
    status = 'crm_completed',
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE record_id = '{{ $json.record_id }}'
AND stage = 'S6';

-- Insert success log
INSERT INTO crm_completion_log
(record_id, crm_id, full_name,
 action, result, http_status)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.record_id }}',
  'CRM-{{ $json.id }}',
  '{{ $json.full_name }}',
  'crm_sync',
  'success',
  200
);

INSERT INTO crm_completion_log
(record_id, full_name,
 action, result, http_status,
 error_message, retry_count)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.record_id }}',
  '{{ $json.full_name }}',
  'crm_sync',
  'failed',
  {{ $json.statusCode || 500 }},
  '{{ $json.message || "API call failed" }}',
  0
);

-- Mark as failed in learners table
UPDATE _learnersRaw
SET status = 'crm_failed',
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE record_id = '{{ $json.record_id }}'
AND stage = 'S6';
